search.tooltip:
Search syntax:
• Text: apple banana
• Exact text: "red apple"
• Exclude: -text or -"text"
• Must include: +text or +"text"
Example: "red apple" +fresh -rotten

feed_table.check_starred_error: Failed to check for starred entries, please try again

settings.duplicate_hotkeys: Duplicate hotkeys detected, please check your hotkeys settings
settings.default_home_page_description: Which page to show by default:
settings.entries_per_page_description: Show how many entries per page:
settings.remove_duplicates_description: Automatically remove duplicate articles based on:
settings.mark_read_on_scroll_label: Mark articles as read when scrolled off screen
settings.mark_read_on_scroll_description: Automatically mark articles as read when they are scrolled out of the visible screen area
settings.mark_read_by_description: Choose how articles are marked as read:
settings.mark_read_after_description: When articles are marked as read by view, wait this many seconds before marking the active article as read.
settings.mark_read_after_disabled_reason: Available only when articles are marked as read by view
settings.enable_context_menu_description: Enable right-click context menu on article cards
settings.compact_sidebar_groups_description: Limit feed group height to prevent long scroll lists (recommended for performance with many feeds)
settings.enable_swipe_gesture_description: Enable swipe gesture to switch articles
settings.swipe_sensitivity_description: Adjust the sensitivity of swipe gestures
settings.update_content_on_fetch_description: Automatically update and save fetched content to database
settings.settings_transfer_description: Export your ReloadedFlux settings to XML or import them on another browser. AI settings are kept local and are not included.
settings.settings_import_description: This will overwrite your current ReloadedFlux settings on this browser. Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.settings_import_ai_notice: AI settings are not imported. Any AI settings already saved in this browser will be kept.
settings.settings_import_reload_notice: Reloading the app to apply all imported settings.

content.label: Content
content.feeds_description: Feed-related options such as showing hidden feeds and filtering.
content.ai_group_description: Configure provider, credentials, and model for summaries.
content.ai_api_key_description: Used to call the selected provider.
content.ai_ollama_url_description: Base URL for your Ollama server.
content.ai_lmstudio_url_description: Base URL for your LM Studio server.
content.ai_model_description: Models detected for the selected provider.
content.ai_provider_description: Select an AI provider for summarization.
content.ai_summary_language_description: Default language used for AI-generated article summaries.
content.ai_summary_excluded_language_description: When an article is written in this language, keep the summary in that language instead of translating it.
content.show_hidden_description: Show all feeds, even the manually hidden ones
content.feeds_show_unread_description: Only display feeds that have unread items.
content.article_description: Article display options: title alignment, font size, and article width.
content.stream_render_selected_only_label: Show full content for selected article
content.stream_render_selected_only_description: Show full content only for the selected article in Combined layout.
content.title_alignment_description: Choose how the article title is aligned.

appearance.layout_mode_description: Switch between the column layout and the combined layout.
appearance.cover_display_mode_description: Choose how article cover images are displayed
appearance.show_detailed_relative_time_description: Show detailed relative time in article card
appearance.show_estimated_reading_time_description: Show estimated reading time in article card
appearance.show_feed_icon_description: Show feed icon in feed list and article card
appearance.lightbox_animation_description: Enable lightbox transitions and smooth scrolling when moving between articles
appearance.font_family_description: Choose the font used across the app.

hotkeys.exitDetailView: Exit the article view and return to the list
hotkeys.fetchOriginalArticle: Fetch and display the original content of the current article
hotkeys.navigateToNextArticle: Navigate to the next article in the list
hotkeys.navigateToNextUnreadArticle: Navigate to the next unread article in the list
hotkeys.navigateToPreviousArticle: Navigate to the previous article in the list
hotkeys.navigateToPreviousUnreadArticle: Navigate to the previous unread article in the list
hotkeys.openLinkExternally: Open the current article's link in a new browser tab
hotkeys.openPhotoSlider: Open the photo slider for viewing all images in the current article
hotkeys.saveToThirdPartyServices: Save the current article to third-party services
hotkeys.toggleReadStatus: Toggle the read status of the current article
hotkeys.toggleStarStatus: Toggle the star status (bookmark) of the current article
